name: equals_exact
description: Tests whether two geometries are point-by-point exactly equal. Note that the order of their vertices matters. Returns TRUE if geometry1 is exactly equal to geometry2.

arguments.description:
Geometry backend implementation: 'QGIS' or 'GEOS'. Both internal implementation uses fuzzy comparison with very low (1e-8) tolerance.
  • 'QGIS' works on 2D, 3D and 4D
  • 'GEOS' works only on 2D components (Z or M components are ignored).

examples.note: Example with 'GEOS' backend, same behavior than 'QGIS' backend.
Uses 'QGIS' as default backend, same behavior than 'GEOS' backend, not the same type, so it fails.
Using 'GEOS' backend, Z coordinates are ignored, so it passes
Using 'QGIS' backend, Z coordinates differ, so it fails
